.github/quarkus-ecosystem-test.general_idea: Change the working directory to 'api' before running Maven to target the correct module.
.github/quarkus-ecosystem-test.why_exists: The build command would fail or run against the wrong module if executed from the repository root without changing directory.

.github/quarkus-ecosystem-test.general_idea: Update the Maven property for Quarkus version to use the devtools-specific property name.
.github/quarkus-ecosystem-test.why_exists: The build would fail to apply the correct version if the property name does not match the expected configuration in the pom.xml.

.github/quarkus-ecosystem-test.general_idea: Explicitly set the Quarkus platform group ID in the Maven command.
.github/quarkus-ecosystem-test.why_exists: The build might fail to resolve the platform BOM if the group ID is not explicitly provided or defaults incorrectly.
